summary: Deterministic fallback contract for provider failures and controlled degrade messaging.
purpose: Normalize LLM failure handling through fixed error categories, policy-bound fallback selection, and deterministic degrade notices.

forbidden_expansion: Free-form narrative generation outside policy constraints.

controls: Fallback logic must not leak provider secrets.
Error classification outputs are constrained to finite enums.
Every degrade notice must include trace-compatible references.

evidence_contract.hash_policy: Fallback decisions must remain trace-compatible and hash-referenced.
evidence_contract.trace_linkage: Every degrade notice must preserve trace-compatible references.

change_log.change: Collapsed safety fallback MCP Markdown docs into a single JSON contract bundle.
